subject: HALTED — v1.0 baseline content not accessible; 3 resolution options for NTS
body: Task LANE01-CLA-PERSISTENT-REMINDERS-UPDATE-V1 HALTED before any v1.1 file authored. Cause: §4 Step A presented 2 paths to v1.0 baseline (read existing OR create from project knowledge); both blocked. Path (a) blocked: governance/UZG_PLUS_LANE1_CLA_PERSISTENT_REMINDERS_v1.md does not exist in workspace (find search 0 hits). Path (b) blocked: CLAC-1 has no tool to fetch content from Claude.ai project knowledge. Authoring §1-§14 from inference would fabricate governance history violating R-CANON-01 spirit (canon append-only). HALT decision is clean: no files authored beyond halt-state DOT deliverables (snapshot + report + audit log + handoff). 3 resolution options documented in snapshot.halt_resolution_options + report §4. Status response to NTS demonstrates the §15 URL block format anyway per task §13 (the rule applied even on halt as proof-of-concept).
requested_action: NTS choose one of 3 resolution options: (1) preferred — paste full v1.0 content of UZG_PLUS_LANE1_CLA_PERSISTENT_REMINDERS_v1.md into chat as code block + re-dispatch this task with v1.0 content embedded; CLAC-1 then authors v1.1 = pasted-v1.0 + new §15 + changelog. ~15 min total. (2) — dispatch standalone URL block rule file task (different filename, single rule, no baseline dependency). ~15 min total but loses centralized-reminders pattern. (3) — pre-commit v1.0 separately via dedicated task before re-dispatching. ~20 min total.
acceptance_criteria: AC-01..AC-04 FAIL — depend on v1.1 file authoring; halted before authoring
AC-05 PASS — halt-state DOT deliverables in audits/ecosystem/uzg-plus/
AC-06 PASS — this handoff JSON schema-conformant
AC-07 PARTIAL — only Report + Snapshot URLs per §15.5 halt convention
AC-10 PASS — [vercel skip] on halt commits
